title: Ranchi University Result 2026 - Ranchi University B.Com Results (OUT)

detail.title: Ranchi University Result 2026 - Ranchi University B.Com Results (OUT)
detail.short_info: Ranchi University Result 2026 : Ranchi University Result 2026 has been released on ranchiuniversity.ac.in. Here is the direct Link to check your UG and PG Course (B.Com) Results Online.

sections.heading: Ranchi University Result 2026 - Ranchi University B.Com Results (OUT)

content.text: Ranchi University Result 2026: Ranchi University has declared the B.Com results for 2nd Semester on ranchiuniversity.ac.in. Students can check their Ranchi University results 2026 online by entering roll number/registration number. Download your Ranchi University mark sheet PDF using the direct link below.

items: Result Status: Released
Exam Name: B.Com
University: Ranchi University
Courses: 2nd Semester
Result Available At: ranchiuniversity.ac.in
Documents Required: Roll Number/Registration Number

sections.heading: Ranchi University Result 2026 Direct Link - Check Here
How to Check Ranchi University Result 2026 Online?

content.text: Students can check their Ranchi University result 2026 for B.Com by following these simple steps:

items: Visit Official Website: Go to ranchiuniversity.ac.in
Find Results Section: Click on "Results" or "Examination" tab on homepage
Select Your Exam: Choose B.Com from the list
Enter Details: Input your Roll Number and Registration Number
Submit & View: Click "Submit" to view your Ranchi University result 2026
Download: Save/print your mark sheet PDF for future reference

content.text: To check your Ranchi University results 2026, students must have the following details ready:

items: Roll Number (as mentioned on admit card)
Registration Number or Application Number
Date of Birth (if required)
Course and Semester details

sections.heading: Ranchi University Mark Sheet 2026 Download Process

content.text: After checking your Ranchi University result 2026, follow these steps to download your mark sheet:

items: View your result on the screen
Click on "Download Mark Sheet" or "Print" button
Save the PDF file to your device
Take multiple printouts for official use
Verify all details (name, roll number, marks) are correct
